facts.statement: An automatic sprinkler system is required when a Group M fire area exceeds 1115 m2.
facts.source_quote: A Group M fire area exceeds 1115 m 2 .

facts.statement: An automatic sprinkler system is required when a Group M fire area is located more than three stories above grade plane.
facts.scope: Group M, fire area above grade plane
facts.source_quote: A Group M fire area is located more than three stories above grade plane.

facts.statement: An automatic sprinkler system is required when the combined area of all Group M fire areas on all floors, including any mezzanines, exceeds 2230 m2.

facts.source_quote: The combined area of all Group M fire areas on all floors, including any mezzanines, exceeds 2230 m 2 .

facts.statement: An automatic sprinkler system is required throughout a Group M fire area where the area used for the display and sale of upholstered furniture or mattresses exceeds 465 m2.

facts.source_quote: An automatic sprinkler system shall be provided throughout a Group M fire area where the area used for the display and sale of upholstered furniture or mattresses exceeds 465 m 2 .
